title: ZetDash
description: A very basic (lazily made) dash mod
body:
A mod I made primarily for my upcoming "ZetCraft 2" modpack that I'm making for my private server.

 

I noticed a lack of dash mods for 1.18 that functioned the way I wanted, so I decided to take a crack at it myself.

The mod is made in MCreator. I can't be bothered to actually learn java/mcforge development, so this is what you're getting.

The dash is activated by pressing the ZetDash key (R by default). Use WASD to change which cardinal direction you dash in.

The dash works in the air, though takes longer to recharge in the air (configurable*).

 

*Configuration is done via commands.

"/zetdash reset" - Resets the ground/air recharge rate values to default (11 and 3 respectively)

"/zetdash groundRecharge xx" - Sets the ground recharge rate to this value (xx) 0 stops the recharge, and 100 is instant.

"/zetdash airRecharge xx" - Sets the ground recharge rate to this value (xx) 0 stops the recharge, and 100 is instant.

 

Yes this is barebones and not amazing, it's not supposed to be.

If there's enough demand I'll put the effort in to make it properly configurable.
